basic_details.job_title: IIT Patna Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow/ Senior Research Fellow Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Patna (IIT Patna) JRF and/or SRF Notification 2026 has been released on 25 June 2026 on the official website iitp.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Patna JRF and/or SRF Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/women/PD candidates will be as per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Physics/Mathematics with minimum CPI 6.5/60%, B.Tech/M.Tech/MCA/MS with CPI 8/75%, Valid GATE (last 5 years) or CSIR/UGC NET preferred; waived for CFTI candidates with CGPA 8.5/80%
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Physics/Mathematics with a minimum CPI of 6.5 out of 10 or 60% marks. B.Tech/M.Tech/MCA/MS with a minimum CPI of 8 out of 10 or 75% marks. A valid GATE score (obtained in the last 5 years) or CSIR/UGC NET qualification is preferred. The GATE/CSIR-UGC NET requirement is waived for candidates from Centrally Funded Technical Institutions (CFTIs) who have a CGPA of 8.5 out of 10 or 80% marks.

salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs. 37,000/- per month + HRA Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Rs. 42,000/- per month + HRA

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Patna JRF and/or SRF Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Patna JRF and/or SRF Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Patna JRF and/or SRF Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_patna: M.Sc. in Physics/Mathematics with minimum CPI 6.5/60%, B.Tech/M.Tech/MCA/MS with CPI 8/75%, Valid GATE (last 5 years) or CSIR/UGC NET preferred; waived for CFTI candidates with CGPA 8.5/80%

content_sections.heading: IIT Patna Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Patna Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Patna JRF and/or SRF Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Patna Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.Sc. in Physics/Mathematics with a minimum CPI of 6.5 out of 10 or 60% marks. B.Tech/M.Tech/MCA/MS with a minimum CPI of 8 out of 10 or 75% marks. A valid GATE score (obtained in the last 5 years) or CSIR/UGC NET qualification is preferred. The GATE/CSIR-UGC NET requirement is waived for candidates from Centrally Funded Technical Institutions (CFTIs) who have a CGPA of 8.5 out of 10 or 80% marks.

content_sections.heading: IIT Patna Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/women/PD candidates will be as per Government of India rules.

content_sections.heading: IIT Patna Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs. 37,000/- per month + HRA Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Rs. 42,000/- per month + HRA

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Patna JRF and/or SRF Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Patna JRF and/or SRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for receiving applications for the IIT Patna JRF and/or SRF recruitment is 10th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the JRF/SRF posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need an M.Sc. in Physics/Mathematics with a minimum CPI of 6.5/60% or a B.Tech/M.Tech/MCA/MS with a minimum CPI of 8/75%. A valid GATE or CSIR-UGC NET score is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the JRF and/or SRF positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the JRF and/or SRF positions is 32 years. Age relaxations will be provided as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the JRF and SRF posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 37,000/- per month plus HRA for JRF and Rs. 42,000/- per month plus HRA for SRF.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply for these positions?
faq.answer: Candidates need to apply via email by sending their complete bio-data and self-attested copies of required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF and/or SRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a hybrid interview.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any relaxations in the age limit?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxations are applicable for SC/ST/OBC/women/PD candidates as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q9. Which documents need to be attached with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates must attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the JRF and/or SRF posts announced by IIT Patna.
